summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Onspotly landing page. All backend APIs (waitlist, shooter-apply) working correctly with proper response structure and Airtable sync. Both frontend forms (Become Shooter, Join Waitlist) submit successfully with success messages displayed. Navigation between all pages works correctly.
passed_tests: POST /api/waitlist - creates waitlist entry with id, name, email, city, timestamp (200)
GET /api/waitlist/count - returns count of waitlist entries (200)
POST /api/shooter-apply - creates shooter application with all 5 fields plus id and timestamp (200)
Frontend: Become Shooter form loads at /become-shooter
Frontend: All shooter form fields (name, email, phone, portfolio, experience) fillable
Frontend: Shooter form submission shows 'Application Submitted!' success state
Frontend: Join Waitlist form loads at /join
Frontend: All waitlist form fields (name, email, city) fillable
Frontend: Waitlist form submission shows 'You're on the list!' success state
Navigation: Home → How It Works works
Navigation: How It Works → Features works
Homepage displays correctly with hero section and animated map
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix in MongoDB during pytest runs
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core functionality verified working. Backend tests are in /app/backend/tests/test_api.py. Both form submissions save to MongoDB AND sync to Airtable (not mocked). The shooter-apply endpoint uses specific Airtable field names: 'Name', 'Email', 'Phone Number', 'Portfolio Link (Website / Instagram / YouTube / TikTok)', 'Years of Experience in iPhone Videography'.
